title: Ubiquiti dual omni antenna airMAX 2x2 MIMO 2,4GHz, 13dBi, rocket kit
description: AMO-2G13 is 2x2 MIMO omnidirectional antenna with 13dBi gain, 360°/7° beam angles and is designed for 2.4GHz band. It was designed to seamlessly integrate with Rocket M radio series. Plug and Play Integration Every airMAX® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount, so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation. Package contains Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
